title: Inside Google's AI Data Centers

segments.title: A Former Coal Plant
segments.audioText: In the foothills of the Appalachians, where a coal plant once operated, now sits a massive data center operated by Google.
segments.transcript: In the foothills of the Appalachians, where a coal plant once operated, now sits a massive data center operated by Google.
segments.translationZh: 喺阿巴拉契亞山腳，以前有一座煤電廠運作嘅地方，依家坐落住一個由 Google 營運嘅大型資料中心。

points.label: In the foothills of the Appalachians
points.explanationZh: 開頭係地點背景；foothills 即山腳地帶，Appalachians 係美國東部山脈。

points.label: where a coal plant once operated
points.explanationZh: where 帶出補充資料；once operated 即『以前曾經運作』。

points.label: now sits a massive data center
points.explanationZh: now sits 係新聞常用寫法，意思係『而家坐落／位於』；massive 即非常大型。

segments.title: A Big Expansion
segments.audioText: This week the tech giant announced a $1.5 billion expansion of its Jackson County, Alabama site.
segments.transcript: This week the tech giant announced a $1.5 billion expansion of its Jackson County, Alabama site.
segments.translationZh: 今個星期，呢間科技巨頭宣布會為佢喺阿拉巴馬州 Jackson County 嘅場地擴建十五億美元。

points.label: This week
points.explanationZh: 新聞入面常用簡短時間詞做開場，提示你事件好新。

points.label: the tech giant announced
points.explanationZh: the tech giant 指大型科技公司；announced 係『宣布』。

points.label: $1.5 billion expansion
points.explanationZh: 聽數字時留意 one point five billion，即十五億美元；expansion 即擴建。

segments.title: Growing Pushback
segments.audioText: The company gave ABC News a rare exclusive look inside the campus, including its high-security server room.
segments.transcript: The company gave ABC News a rare exclusive look inside the campus, including its high-security server room.
segments.translationZh: 公司罕有地畀 ABC News 獨家參觀園區內部，包括佢嘅高保安伺服器房。

points.label: gave ABC News
points.explanationZh: gave 呢度唔係『送禮』，係『提供／安排』一個機會。

points.label: a rare exclusive look
points.explanationZh: rare 即少有；exclusive look 即獨家參觀或獨家鏡頭。

points.label: including its high-security server room
points.explanationZh: including 後面係例子；server room 係伺服器房，high-security 表示保安嚴密。

segments.title: Public Concerns
segments.audioText: As tech giants race to build out this infrastructure, recent Gallup polling shows 71% of Americans oppose the construction of AI data centers in their area.
segments.transcript: As tech giants race to build out this infrastructure, recent Gallup polling shows 71% of Americans oppose the construction of AI data centers in their area.
segments.translationZh: 當科技巨頭加速建設呢類基礎設施時，近期 Gallup 民調顯示，百分之七十一美國人反對喺自己地區興建 AI 資料中心。

points.label: As tech giants race to build out
points.explanationZh: As 呢度係『當……嘅時候』；race to 表示趕住、加速去做。

points.label: this infrastructure
points.explanationZh: infrastructure 指基礎設施；呢度係資料中心、電力、網絡等配套。

points.label: 71% of Americans oppose
points.explanationZh: 聽百分比先抓 seventy-one percent；oppose 即反對。

points.label: in their area
points.explanationZh: in their area 即喺佢哋自己附近／地區，講嘅係本地社區感受。

sentences: In the foothills of the Appalachians, where a coal plant once operated, now sits a massive data center operated by Google.
This week the tech giant announced a $1.5 billion expansion of its Jackson County, Alabama site.
The company gave ABC News a rare exclusive look inside the campus, including its high-security server room.
As tech giants race to build out this infrastructure, recent Gallup polling shows 71% of Americans oppose the construction of AI data centers in their area.

vocabulary.example: The town sits in the foothills of the mountains.
vocabulary.translationZh: 呢個小鎮位於山腳地帶。

vocabulary.example: The plant operated for many years.
The company built a massive facility.
vocabulary.translationZh: 公司興建咗一個大型設施。

vocabulary.example: The expansion will add new jobs.
The reporter got an exclusive look inside the site.
vocabulary.translationZh: 記者獲得獨家機會參觀場地內部。

vocabulary.example: Data centers need strong power infrastructure.
vocabulary.translationZh: 資料中心需要強大嘅電力基礎設施。

vocabulary.example: Some residents oppose the new project.
vocabulary.translationZh: 有啲居民反對呢個新項目。

phrases.example: A coal plant once operated on the site.
ABC News got a rare exclusive look inside the campus.
Tech companies are racing to build out data centers.
Many people oppose data centers in their area.

speakingPractice.instructionZh: 由 00:05 跟讀第一句，先分成三段：In the foothills / where a coal plant once operated / now sits a massive data center。
重播 00:18，聽寫 $1.5 billion expansion 同 Jackson County, Alabama site。
用 announced a... expansion 練替換：The company announced a new expansion of its site.
用兩句英文複述：Google is expanding an AI data center in Alabama. Some Americans worry about data centers in their area.

notes: 今日片段係 ABC News / GMA 2 分 14 秒短新聞，主題係 AI 資料中心同社區關注，適合練科技新聞常見詞。
聽力重點係地點、數字同抽象名詞：foothills、$1.5 billion、infrastructure、71%。先抓核心名詞，再補細節。
時間碼 00:05、00:18、00:42、01:09 可以逐句重播；每句跟讀時留意新聞旁白嘅停頓。
dailyLifePractice 會配合科技主題，練店內求助、工作更新同解釋延遲，保持輕鬆實用。

dailyLifePractice.title: Asking for Tech Help
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：你喺店入面想問職員點揀充電線或配件，語氣直接但有禮貌。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Hi, could you help me find a charger for this laptop? I'm not sure which one fits. I just need something reliable for travel.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Hi, could you help me find a charger for this laptop?
lines.zh: 你好，可唔可以幫我搵呢部手提電腦用嘅充電器？

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.en: Sure. Do you know the model?

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I'm not sure which one fits.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I just need something reliable for travel.
lines.zh: 我只係需要一款去旅行都穩陣啲嘅。

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: Could you help me find...? 係好自然嘅店內求助句。something reliable 聽落實際，唔似 textbook 式講法。

drills.label: Substitution
drills.prompt: 將 a charger 換成 an adapter、a cable 或 a phone case。
drills.example: Could you help me find an adapter for this laptop?

drills.label: Quick repeat
drills.prompt: 跟讀 I'm not sure which one fits. 三次。
drills.example: I'm not sure which one fits.

dailyLifePractice.title: Quick Coworker Update
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：你想同同事快速講一個項目進度，順便提有少少資料要再確認。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Quick update: I finished the first draft. I still need to double-check a few numbers. I'll send it over after lunch.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Quick update: I finished the first draft.
lines.zh: 快快更新一下：我完成咗第一版。

lines.speaker: Coworker
lines.en: Nice. Anything you need from me?
lines.zh: 好呀。要我幫手做啲咩嗎？

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I still need to double-check a few numbers.
lines.zh: 我仲要再核對幾個數字。

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I'll send it over after lunch.
lines.zh: 我食完午飯之後會傳畀你。

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: Quick update: 係美式職場好常用嘅開場。double-check 比 check again 更自然，意思係再確認一次。

drills.label: Say-it-your-way
drills.prompt: 用 Quick update 開頭講你完成咗一件事。
drills.example: Quick update: I finished the slides.

drills.label: Substitution
drills.prompt: 將 after lunch 換成 this afternoon、by five 或 tomorrow morning。
drills.example: I'll send it over this afternoon.

dailyLifePractice.title: Explaining a Small Delay
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：你遲少少先覆訊息或交資料，要簡短解釋同講下一步。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Sorry for the delay. I was tied up with another call. I'm looking at it now and I'll get back to you shortly.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I was tied up with another call.
lines.zh: 我啱啱忙住另一個電話。

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I'm looking at it now and I'll get back to you shortly.

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: I was tied up with... 係自然口語，意思係『我忙住……』。I'll get back to you shortly 比 very soon 稍為正式，但仍然日常可用。

drills.label: Polite rephrase
drills.prompt: 用 Sorry for the delay 開頭，講你而家處理緊。
drills.example: Sorry for the delay. I'm working on it now.

drills.label: Short response
drills.prompt: 朋友話 No worries，你用一句話承諾下一步。
drills.example: Thanks, I'll send it over shortly.
